title: How are you feeling? — новые слова

items.example: I've had a headache all morning.
She stayed home because she had a sore throat.
He can't stop coughing — he's had a bad cough for a week.
The nurse took my temperature and said I had a fever.
I've got a runny nose and I keep sneezing.
Eating too much chocolate gave me a stomach ache.
Sitting at a desk all day causes back pain.
The child was crying because of an earache.
I felt dizzy after standing up too quickly.
The bumpy car ride caused nausea.
She developed a rash after eating shellfish.
The doctor gave me a prescription for antibiotics.
You can buy painkillers at the pharmacy.
Common symptoms of a cold include a runny nose and a sore throat.
